title: Spanish Creamy Cheese Fritters
description: A delicious and crispy fritter filled with creamy Spanish cheese. Serve as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Cut the filo dough into 4 equal pieces.
Place one piece of filo dough in the bottom of the baking dish, brushing with some olive oil.
Mix the cream cheese, ricotta cheese, and 1/4 cup of the Manchego cheese in a bowl.
Spread half of the cheese mixture on top of the filo dough.
Repeat the process with the remaining filo dough, cheese mixture, and Manchego cheese.
Brush the top of the fritters with some olive oil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Cut into squares and serve warm.
